title: NodeInfo endpoints (/.well-known/nodeinfo + /nodeinfo/2.0)
description: Implement NodeInfo 2.0 for instance discovery. Two endpoints: /.well-known/nodeinfo returns the link document pointing to /nodeinfo/2.0, which returns the full metadata. users.total is hardcoded to 1 (not persona count) to keep persona count out of aggregators.
design: users.total=1 intentionally. localPosts from COUNT of posts table. software.name='smallhold', software.version from Cargo.toml via env\!('CARGO_PKG_VERSION').
acceptance_criteria: GET /.well-known/nodeinfo returns link to /nodeinfo/2.0; GET /nodeinfo/2.0 returns valid NodeInfo 2.0 document with software name 'smallhold', protocol 'activitypub', openRegistrations false
